game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ダンジョン・ウォーフェア2 (Dungeon Warfare 2):** Dungeon Warfare 2 is a top-down tower defense game where players strategically place 33 unique traps on a grid-based dungeon path to eliminate waves of 30+ enemy types. Players tap on empty grid cells to select and deploy traps from a UI menu, each possessing 8 upgradeable traits like increased damage or area-of-effect. Successful defense earns gold for purchasing new traps and upgrading existing ones, alongside experience points (XP) that unlock skill points for three distinct skill trees, each containing 11 passive abilities. Progression involves completing 60+ developer-designed levels and procedurally generated dungeons, with difficulty scaling via combinable runes that increase enemy stats (e.g., +20% HP, +15% speed) for greater rewards. The core loop involves defending against waves, upgrading traps, and developing skill trees, with a level ending in victory if fewer than 20 enemies escape, or defeat if the escape limit is reached.
game_info.description: Defend your dungeon against waves of invading enemies! Place powerful traps on the dungeon path to eliminate foes before they escape. Earn gold from defeated enemies to purchase and upgrade traps. Gain XP to unlock passive abilities in three skill trees. Complete waves while keeping escaped enemies under the limit to win. Strategic trap placement and smart upgrades are key to victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor to select grid cells
Space: Open trap menu / Confirm trap placement
Z: Upgrade selected trap (when hovering over a trap)
Shift: Sell selected trap (when hovering over a trap)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (returns to start screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic trap placement mechanics and ensures the player can place traps on valid grid cells. Validates that traps are correctly added to the game state and rendered on screen.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move cursor to different grid positions along the path and place basic damage traps. Verify each trap placement updates the game state correctly and gold is deducted.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Multiple traps should be successfully placed on the grid. Gold should decrease with each placement. Game state should accurately track all placed traps. No errors should occur during placement.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by implementing an optimal strategy to defend against all enemy waves. Places strategic traps and upgrades them to maximize damage output.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Place arrow traps at key choke points early in the path to maximize hits per enemy. Upgrade traps when gold allows. Focus on creating overlapping damage zones. Let first wave provide gold, then invest heavily in upgrades.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defend against all waves with fewer than 20 enemies escaping. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Validate that strategic trap placement and upgrades lead to victory within reasonable time.
